mapper.sql: id, user_id, category_id, title, type, status, create_time, update_time, edit_count, deleted_by, deleted_reason, deleted_time, comment_count, score
id, user_id, category_id, title, type, status, create_time, comment_count, score
mapper.select:
select from discuss_post where status != 2 and id in
#{pid, jdbcType=BINARY}
mapper.insert: insert into discuss_post() values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY},#{userId, jdbcType=BINARY},#{categoryId, jdbcType=BINARY},#{title},#{type},#{status},#{createTime},#{commentCount},#{score})
mapper.update: update discuss_post set comment_count = #{commentCount} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
update discuss_post set type = #{type} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
update discuss_post set status = #{status} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
update discuss_post set score = #{score} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
update discuss_post set title = #{title}, category_id = #{categoryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = #{updateTime}, edit_count = edit_count + 1 where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
